utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item is fully specified with detailed coverage descriptions and associated costs (monthly and currency, plus total annual cost in total_budget). Therefore, all required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: (1) health coverage named 'LifeFirst Standard Plan', (2) property coverage describing home contents and photography equipment protection but without a named plan, (3) travel coverage described as global travel insurance with adventure add-on but no explicit plan name, and (4) additional services including concierge, dedicated agent, 24/7 support, stress management, and gym reimbursement. Based on the ground-truth data: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under physical health has a rating of 9. The property coverage matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 9) under property_protection.home_content. The travel coverage matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (rating 9). The additional services include 'Concierge service' (rating 1 under travel_enhancement_services.Concierge Services) and 'Gym reimbursement' (rating 2 under health_enhancement_services.Gym Membership Reimbursement). Therefore, each selected item is mapped to its corresponding rating.
